h9560a50bgc4e4g46cdgb71fgff66745e4ed2: We're ready to celebrate. Are you?
h23be2189g2bccg4802g80ffg1d89fa580134: I'm ready to go to camp now.
he5b5acdfg178dg4502g8c85g8a58031ac571: Best news I've heard all day.
h077473d4g9a90g449dg8fb8g4fe021182e2b: I'll let you know when I'm ready.
h57d13bc3gccb9g4d1bg8718g5a2f13373d5a: We've just got word - the goblins have cleared out. And I hear it's you we have to thank.
ha65bd06cg5564g4609g99a0gd3b85180da1e: Here - it's not much, but it's yours. Zevlor ordered a collection, before...
hc30975b7g8a1bg4b31g9540gba5543f15eac: Before he left. But we're here, and we're alive. That's cause for celebration.
h3f7db565gf804g48c1ga524g0fb1d397a257: Before he passed. But the time for mourning's done. I mean to celebrate.
h9707aaa3gd964g41ceg81b1g197cfe0f7599: My people would be honoured to join your camp tonight, if you'll have us. We're ready to go when you are.
hbe2cf4ddg07e3g42fdg83e3gc7b88d4499a5: Though - you might want to speak to Halsin first. He turned up a short while ago.
h13478fe6g7221g44eeg98d0g4435df6170bf: He's having words with Kagha. Reckon you don't want to miss that, but come find us after.
hae800876g510cg48e6gb47eg61995a5984be: Watching gods - while I was training children, you were out cutting down an entire goblin camp.
he9603bd9gfaf3g4fb7g86cag45688bdd394a: You've cleared the way for us - as clear as it gets, anyway. Thank you.
he76e2a3egf9aeg4dd5g8acbgf260eb86e974: To think I was scared of a bloody drow. Should've known better - we had you.
h39b0c4aag8e43g4a40g9bcege321beb1ff70: On to the city. After what you showed us, I damn well pity any who try and keep us out.
h22f5d5cdg0e5cg4ec4g8e91g48d69af1b3f1: Gods, they're going to want a bloody speech, aren't they?
h614d8530gf55ag4088g8371g1e6dafa8c4dd: Won't pretend I expected to see you back again. Bloody glad, mind.
hccf9e209ga897g4345g8d81gaaa96141069e: People are scared. Zevlor's doing what he can, but...
h04adbd71g017bg4e7bg8d34gd66c029375f6: Well. Seeing you on the walls might put the steel in their spines. Mine, too.
h79f13237gb87bg4a46g8292ge5695f1c3fbf: My students are down in the cave. With wooden bloody swords, Torm spare me.
h7032a005g685bg42b7gb68bg5f6892a19442: Well - are we ready? Tymora's spun her coin, and I would see which way it lands.
h8136d53bg33b3g48b3gb9fag0917fc45a3c2: As we'll ever be. Let's go.
h3532432agdd24g47d6gb17fg28551fe5db80: Let the bastards know we're waiting for them.
h131e2072g5e9dg4bb3gbcc9g311c47156f3d: Hold on - what's the plan again?
hfee51395gcdf9g448egb27fgef383266d612: Simplest strategy there is: draw them in and burn them faster than they can burn us.
h972a3c20g305bg495ega42egba3c3dc9b657: Sound the horn - let the bastards know we're waiting for them.
ha13cbe95g2046g4ecdg8597g0f9a1be2135d: Give me a moment. I have more to do.
h3a4afc95g5de3g4f67g9be3gb365fa8ee028: Aye, fair enough. Just don't take too long.
h7f498e2bga321g40b5gbdddg3ab98b57ff5f: I'd sooner start this on our terms than theirs.
hdbd8664eg3f27g406agbf10gbe5913805fb5: Wyll told me you gave us up to the goblins - bloody glad he had it wrong.
h8fd5d917g34a2g481egb977g72cacd6824f0: We'll need every blade if we're to make a fight of this.
he791ded6gebaag4d93gafc0g4ac787fc8e61: Watching gods, but you're a prettier sight than any I expected to see today.
h305bda51gcfa7g424dg9c60g2fd298d7367a: I'd given you up for dead at the goblin camp - and our hopes along with you.
h6270087ag7330g47e2g9d40g97c19f295550: What happened!? We've spotted goblins massing in the woods.
h4915cc95g5186g4befga074g3f3de4abe936: I met the drow commanding them - and led her here.
he7341ad7g9cabg4c77g9ecbg49cdbbe3297d: A... a drow? Why the hells would you bring her here?
h4508efb8g825eg47edg848bg9a2d4c25897b: She tricked me. But I mean to make up for it.
ha2c900d4g5439g4f6bga81agd081aac793bb: 'Make up for it'? How the bloody hell -
h9003494bg4263g461fg8aedgd19b2d77073e: Gods damn it, I'm sorry. I know you wouldn't draw her on us.
h43664b21g8a11g4b5dgb059g1e608db79057: Not after you've already saved us once before. We'll need your help again now.
h85d5bb0cge52ag4a71gbff5g0ee92e7531a7: All part of the plan. I'll give the signal and she'll march into our trap.
h02b993ceg83d6g423egbdaeg57b2dc6c812a: Trap a drow? Easier trap a spider in its own damned web!
h7ce861e4gc618g4e5dgae4bg0328f6172335: But... aye, I trust you, Torm spare me. You've seen us right once before.
hbf038796g86dbg4438g8ccbg045a2e644d68: If we've got any chance at all, it'll be with you on our side.
h107b622dg44a8g4ee5g825ag78b4d68bbf1e: It's a trap - and she's waiting for my signal. Don't quibble with me now.
ha335cd78ge1ffg481dg96bcg6b537ec614da: A trap? We're the the ones backed into a corner here, I'd say.
h8ce2f0abg22a6g4ff8ga2bcg3aea1c4e9d0a: To burn the grove, of course. For the glory of the Absolute.
h8768bf39g1c88g4ce9gb8b4g4d70cb6532e2: It's a full war-band, led by a drow.
hd92fbf7eg5836g4e72gb95bg743aafe6e662: ... a drow. Right - I'd say I'm surprised, but Beshaba's had her mark on us since Elturel.
h3e391443gd322g4aacg9408g9a8266793694: No two ways about it, now - a fight it'll have to be.
h0df6282dgaad1g48d8ga870gb5baa1d79ae6: You helped us throw them back once before - fancy doing it again?
h44e0ac7ag63d0g454bgb371ge4b21d45ba1e: Of course. Tell me what you need.
h29999758g941eg46cfga640gcbb8904bfdb5: Hah! Enough warriors to make this a fair fight. Failing that, we've got the means to make it unfair.
h470f0315g782cg42e6g8ab4g3f1fd8e2ad4c: That's why our every ounce of anything that goes boom is buried out in front of that gate.
h855ffd0cg47acg47b2g91e6gc864c0f58c0c: Once we're ready, we'll draw 'em in to that spot. Then it's down to fire-arrows and prayer.
hf672d7e5geaa3g4221g98abga6b7834d06ec: We'll have to lure them in first.
h2a68471eg48cfg4a81g83ecg83197fdbabcd: You said it's a drow in charge, yeah? They ain't stupid, so I hear - but they are proud.
h87121a8fg4d85g4429gb967g45868361ca05: That horn can be heard half the world away - let's issue a challenge, shall we?
h044f329fgda95g46a0g8bdcgd1f6bc5beaec: She's expecting to find us broken - let's show her just what a mistake she's made.
haffe545egcea6g4c06ga11dg31ac7d0508ba: Time to paint the ground red, chief.
h23043a51ga425g40f2g8b29gffccad8ca4c8: A bold plan - but a risky one.
hcef12872g9e7fg45b6gb39fgc2f29bdc7afa: Not so risky. Drow are cunning buggers, aye - but proud too, the way I hear it.
h19996c85g60d9g4ecdgaca1ga195264a42ed: That horn can be heard half the world away - let's issue a challenge, eh?
h1840a6e1g4a57g472cg9480g79be38f2186c: That's it? Please tell me you've thought of another option.
h0f6050ebg835eg4bd6gb2f2gc30b39895390: Burning drow sounds a pretty good option to me - but we'll have to get her here first.
h0e1eeefcg0ba4g4e21ga173g491ee6032346: That's the stupidest damn plan I've ever heard.
h2e074701gc4b0g4151g8ebfg7da84d4cfa1f: No doubt - but thick as I might be, I reckon this drow is likely twice as proud.
ha805b498ga611g4fe9g80c5g7c2e40375d08: Fact is, we can't beat 'em - not in a fair fight. So best make it as unfair as possible, eh?
h1a14bbbegecfdg43cbg80eegeb5422f16eeb: You've reinforced the place - those barricades might even hold.
h064637a6g3f99g494cgb66eged5ebf0c0a1f: Oh aye, we've been busy. Fact is, we won't win in a fair fight - so best make it as unfair as we can.
h798903f0g4155g4017gbdc0g89e705b143bd: No, you don't get it. I'm with them.
h77104c5dgea30g4715g836eg45c8b44354af: I have a god to please, and Bhaal loves murder.
h61cc26cbgd387g45a8g832cg4c6bbc4fe6b3: Well to the Hells with you - and your god and all. Guards! Weapons!
ha6a4cbc3gd46bg427bg8d07gc2addf7d2ce3: I have a god to please, and Myrkul loves a slaughter.
h4c25e3b9g63f6g48fdgbd4cg7cd5a8397565: I have a god to please, and Bhaal loves murder.
hdbe2f53bg370eg460dg822cg62f6413b81c8: I have a god to please, and Myrkul loves a slaughter.
h9f3e50d8gd2feg4a03g8b59g2b628dbb3768: What? You think a bloodline makes us allies?
ha85fd286g2acfg4decg9e0agf62744ada4a5: Simple - the goblins are a lot more useful to me.
he0d728d0g24e1g4366g9df7ge233c09e6292: Well to the hells with you, then. Guards - weapons!
heef66552gf3afg4d47g93c2ga4d0fc15ebd3: For the glory of the Absolute. Why else?
h7fb3a931gadc2g4a10gbf20g5afbf0b4894d: Their drow commander found the grove - and she means to take it.
hf5973f62g30f7g464cgb751g16ddd31d4192: ... a drow. Right - I'd say I'm surprised, but Beshaba's had her mark on us since Elturel.
h27dac1f5gb35bg4cf9g97a3g8d7eb4866282: You don't owe us any apologies - but I'll take your help, if you're offering.
h70439e61g8770g4978g965egd9987cfbd689: What do you think? Ready for battle - and leave the drow to me.
he2023288gff1dg4030g9078gdda2e599d132: ... a drow. Right - I'd say I'm surprised, but Beshaba's had her mark on us since Elturel.
h04263697g52feg4311gb53bgfb735a8e4ec3: But if you're willing to spit in Lady Doom's eye along with us, I won't turn you down.
he49be64agb650g4b18gb70bge5f95a77c909: Who knows - with your help, might be we can even make a fight of it.
ha618c807ga03bg49b3gbcd5ga72769cdf004: Gods, thought I was seeing a bloody ghost. How did you survive the goblin camp?
h0201da54g0f4cg45a7g9995g875d3ab28619: More importantly - what happened? We've spotted them massing in the woods.
hc87cf28fg74f7g4338g88beg1825f64b38bf: Oi, under-elf! I hear you drow are like worms - too thick to die, even split in half!
hb58157c6g1108g4705g862ega81c375ca6bc: Stop skulking and come show me, eh?
